original_statement: which year was davis loves best earning year?
mutated_statement: which year was the subject's best and worst earning year?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization] + [Possessive insertion] + [Scope expansion]: Replaced proper name "davis loves" with generic "the subject" | Added possessive "'s" for grammaticality | Expanded question to request both best and worst earning years by inserting "and worst" (which year was davis loves best earning year? → which year was the subject's best and worst earning year?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 正确执行扩展非矛盾指令
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可识别出的关键信息：判定说明明确写到“2003为最高收入年，1985为最低收入年”，并确认预测答案“2003|1985”正确。Agent在日志中具体表现为按表格操作（select_column、sort_column），并用simple_query返回结果“2003|1985”，同时在thought中陈述了最高与最低收入的数值依据。整个过程表明Agent没有遇到或报告任何指令冲突，而是将变异问题（从单一‘best’扩展为‘best and worst’）视为可解的范围扩展并直接计算出两端答案。因此将其归类为“正确执行扩展非矛盾指令”——即题目并非矛盾性指令，Agent正确识别并完成了扩展后的查询，故不适合既有的矛盾处理分类。
